name: Merchant Loans (상점 대출)
author: inggom
description: Borrow gold at the Act 1 merchant to afford what you can't quite pay for. Taking a loan grants the Merchant's Ledger relic, which tracks what you owe — an origination fee plus interest that accrues each room you carry the debt. Fall behind and escalating Debt curses (Delinquency, then Seizure, then Bad Credit and its Forced Collection) seep into your combats. The Standing Order power feeds you Payment cards to whittle the debt down, and a dedicated debt shop lets you buy payment-engine cards on credit. Repay the principal at any shop to clear the Ledger and restore your credit. In co-op the debt is contagious, interest scales with how many players owe, and a Bailout card lets you pay down a teammate's debt. Fully localized in 14 languages. — PLAYTEST BUILD.
